content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach deploys the exact diagnostic signature question from the expected territory — 'what are you not saying to your partner?' (turn 6) — at precisely the right moment, and holds it when the client deflects (turn 4 → 6 redirect). The follow-ups ('what's one thing you almost said this week,' 'what would you have said,' 'how long have you been not saying it,' 'what does a while feel like in your body') are all AoA-flavored moves: surfacing suppressed material with specificity, then dropping from story into body (feel-over-figure). The coach does not take 'we're fine' at face value (avoiding trap 1), does not insist something is wrong (avoiding trap 2), does not jump to a walking-on-eggshells diagnosis (avoiding trap 3), and does not evangelize. No generic therapy language ('how does that make you feel?'), no CBT reframing, no IFS parts language. Every intervention is a signature move used appropriately for the live material.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tracks micro-signal (the pause) rather than content — classic AoA noticing move."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Deploys the diagnostic signature question 'what are you not saying' verbatim from expected territory."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the deflection and re-poses the question precisely — meets resistance with okay, redirects without force."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Concretizes the inquiry ('one thing you almost said this week') — a signature move to surface specific suppressed material rather than abstract claims."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the thread, invites the unsaid into the room — lets-go-there move."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Time-dimension question reveals the chronic pattern without naming it — letting the client surface walking-on-eggshells themselves."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Drops from story to body — feel-over-figure invocation at the exact moment something is moving."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["what-are-you-defending", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "lets-go-there", "the-happiness-filter", "walking-on-eggshells"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["trigger", "complementary-trauma-surfaces"],
  "notes": "The 'what are you defending' question is functionally present even if not verbatim — the coach repeatedly probes the defended posture around 'we're fine.' Conversation cut before pattern-naming, but the trajectory is faithful."
}
